name: Yincheng Life Service CO., Ltd.
summary: Yincheng Life Service CO., Ltd., an investment holding company, provides property management services in the Mainland China. It offers range of property management services, including security, cleaning, car park management, gardening and landscaping, daily repair and maintenance of equipment and machinery, and ancillary customer services, as well as repair and maintenance of specialized elevators, escalators, and mechanical car park equipment; and community value-added services, such as common area value-added, fitness, and community convenience. The company provides its services for various properties, including residential properties and non-residential properties comprising government facilities, financial institutions, property sales offices, hospitals, commercial complexes, parks, highway service areas, industrial parks, mixed-use properties, schools, and office buildings. As of December 31, 2020, it managed 369 properties, including 162 residential properties, and 207 non-residential properties; and served 300,000 households. In addition, the company offers decoration, engineering, and catering services. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Nanjing, the People's Republic of China.
